name: gemini-horizon
description: Experience Google Gemini without limits. Expands conversations and tables to the full width of your browser for a true widescreen AI experience.

scripts.generate-icons: mkdir -p src/icons src/assets && sips -Z 16 assets/icon.png --out src/icons/icon16.png && sips -Z 32 assets/icon.png --out src/icons/icon32.png && sips -Z 48 assets/icon.png --out src/icons/icon48.png && sips -Z 128 assets/icon.png --out src/icons/icon128.png && cp assets/icon.png src/assets/icon.png
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && npm run generate-icons && mkdir -p dist && cp -r src/* dist/ && npm run minify
